title: Codex Persistent Goals and Automatic Continuation · Goal Brief: Goal File Routing
summary: Operate a long Codex task with a persistent goal, checkpoints, and user control. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops goal file routing increment in a Codex persistent-goal operating playbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep long instructions in a referenced file while the goal remains concise.
Set, view, edit, pause, resume, and clear a Codex persistent goal with the documented goal interface.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
